_meta.tagline: Product clarity, from signal to spec.
_meta.stack: React + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4 + Framer Motion + Lucide React
_meta.aesthetic: Sparse, high-contrast, tool-first. Inspired by Linear's density and Vercel's monochrome restraint. No gradients except subtle AI surfaces. Dark-first.

color._note: Use CSS variables everywhere. Never hardcode hex. Toggle [data-theme='dark'] on <html> for dark mode.

typography._note: Geist is Vercel's open-source font. Optically clean at small sizes. Perfect for a dense tool UI.

spacing._note: 4px base grid only. No arbitrary values.

shell.collapse_1100px: 44px nav (icons only) + main canvas, hide right panel
shell.note: This is fixed. Do not invent alternate layouts.

layout.content_max_width: 72ch for reading columns. No limit for data panels.

button.base_css: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 font-medium rounded-[--r-md] transition-all duration-[--dur-fast] focus-visible:outline-2 focus-visible:outline-[--accent] focus-visible:outline-offset-2 select-none cursor-pointer whitespace-nowrap

variants.secondary: bg-[--surface] text-[--text-2] border border-[--border] hover:border-[--border-strong] hover:text-[--text-1]
variants.ghost: bg-transparent text-[--text-2] border border-transparent hover:bg-[--surface-2] hover:text-[--text-1]

input.base_css: w-full h-8 px-3 text-[14px] text-[--text-1] bg-[--surface] border border-[--border] rounded-[--r-md] placeholder:text-[--text-3] transition-all duration-[--dur-fast] focus:outline-none focus:border-[--accent] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[--accent]/10

card.ai: bg-[--ai-surface] border border-[--ai-border] border-l-[3px] border-l-[--accent] rounded-[--r-lg] p-5
card.ai_rule: EVERY AI card MUST include: (1) 'Prodify' badge top-right, (2) thumbs feedback row at bottom. Non-negotiable.

badge.base_css: inline-flex items-center gap-1 px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[11px] font-medium rounded-[--r-sm]

nav_item.base_css: flex items-center gap-2.5 h-8 px-2.5 rounded-[--r-md] text-[14px] font-medium text-[--text-2] transition-all duration-[--dur-fast] cursor-pointer select-none
nav_item.section_label: px-2.5 pt-4 pb-1 text-[11px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.07em] text-[--text-3]

command_palette.trigger: Cmd+K / Ctrl+K — every screen, no exceptions
command_palette.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black/50 backdrop-blur-sm z-50 flex items-start justify-center pt-[15vh]
command_palette.panel: w-[min(600px,90vw)] bg-[--surface] border border-[--border] rounded-[--r-xl] shadow-[--shadow-cmd] overflow-hidden
command_palette.input: w-full px-5 py-4 text-[16px] bg-transparent border-b border-[--border] text-[--text-1] placeholder:text-[--text-3] focus:outline-none
command_palette.item: flex items-center gap-3 px-3 py-2.5 mx-2 rounded-[--r-md] text-[14px] text-[--text-2] cursor-pointer

ai_output_block.wrapper: ai-block bg-[--ai-surface] border border-[--ai-border] border-l-[3px] border-l-[--accent] rounded-[--r-lg] p-5
ai_output_block.label: Prodify badge — badge variant 'ai', text 'Prodify', top-right of header
ai_output_block.streaming: append blinking | cursor — CSS: @keyframes blink { 50% { opacity: 0 } } — 1s step-end infinite. Color: --accent
ai_output_block.feedback: thumbs-up / thumbs-down ghost icon buttons, bottom-right of block. Always present.
ai_output_block.rule: Never use the word 'AI' in the UI. Say 'Prodify'. Never use a robot icon.

skeleton.rule: Match shape exactly to the content it replaces. Never use spinners.

kbd.css: inline-flex items-center px-1.5 py-0.5 text-[11px] font-mono text-[--text-3] bg-[--surface-2] border border-[--border] rounded-[--r-sm]
kbd.rule: All primary actions must show their keyboard shortcut in the UI — inside the button or as a trailing <kbd> element.

topbar.css: h-11 border-b border-[--border] bg-[--surface] flex items-center px-4 gap-3
topbar.rule: Contains: app logo left, breadcrumb center, user avatar + theme toggle right.

screens._demo_scenario: Priya, PM at a fintech startup. Uploads 3 user interview transcripts. Asks 'What should we build next?' → Prodify synthesises insights → generates a structured PRD → prioritises 5 features by impact.

dashboard.layout: 3 stat cards (top row) + recent activity feed (60%) + quick actions panel (40%)
dashboard.empty_state: Single large ghost button 'Start your first project' with Zap icon. No illustrations.

prd_editor.layout: Full-width doc editor. Right AI panel slides in on generation.
prd_editor.toolbar: Floating on text selection: Bold, H2, H3, Link, Comment only. No full toolbar bar.
prd_editor.ai_insertion: Generated content = AI card. User can Accept (inserts to doc) / Reject / Regenerate.
prd_editor.autosave: Every 5s. Top-right: teal dot + 'Saved' text, fades after 2s.

research.upload: Drag-drop zone for .txt / .pdf / .vtt transcripts. Shows file count.
research.query_input: Bottom of panel. Natural language. E.g. 'Top 3 pain points?' → AI Card response.
research.insight_cards: AI Card per insight. Includes: insight text, supporting quote (collapsible), confidence (High / Medium — 2 states only).

prioritisation.view: Kanban — 3 columns: Backlog / Considering / Committed. Drag-drop.
prioritisation.feature_card: Shows: feature name, AI impact score 1–10 (indigo bar), source tag.
prioritisation.ai_action: Floating 'Prioritise for me' button → animated reorder via Framer Motion.

motion.entry: translateY(6px)→0 + opacity 0→1, 280ms --ease-out. For panels, cards, AI blocks.
motion.success: scale 0→1.1→1 in 240ms, --success color. Teal checkmark only.

do: Use CSS variables for every color — never hardcode hex
Skeleton loaders for all async content
Cmd+K command palette accessible on every screen
All primary actions must show keyboard shortcuts in UI
AI content always in AI cards with Prodify badge + feedback
dont: Use Inter, Roboto, Arial, or system fonts
Use Tailwind dark: prefix — use CSS variables instead
Use the word 'AI' in any visible UI copy — say 'Prodify'
Use bounce, spring, or elastic animation easings
Use modals for non-critical errors — use inline toast/badge
Use more than 3 typeface weights in any single screen
